channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/4/27)
channel.description: 今天的资讯简直就是为你量身定做的！Codex相关的讨论、国产大模型的真实体验、AI Agent的实践案例，以及大量围绕AI编程的思考和争论，都非常有料。有一堆热门话题值得深挖，以下是精选出来的内容。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 今天的资讯简直就是为你量身定做的！Codex相关的讨论、国产大模型的真实体验、AI Agent的实践案例，以及大量围绕AI编程的思考和争论，都非常有料。有一堆热门话题值得深挖，以下是精选出来的内容。

item.title: deepseek-ai/TileKernels
item.description: A kernel library written in tilelang | 近期热门 | 总 1226 stars
item.author: deepseek-ai

item.title: tashfeenahmed/freellmapi
item.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only. | 近期热门 | 总 532 stars
item.author: tashfeenahmed

item.title: chekusu/wanman
item.description: wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It lets human users step back into an observer role while local agent runtimes coordinate autonomous multi-agent workflows, task execution, and artifacts. | 近期热门 | 总 368 stars
item.author: chekusu

item.title: alash3al/stash
item.description: Stash — persistent memory layer for AI agents. Episodes, facts, and working context stored in Postgres. MCP server included. Self-hosted, single binary, no cloud required. | 近期热门 | 总 289 stars
item.author: alash3al

item.title: CookSleep/gpt_image_playground
item.description: 基于 OpenAI gpt-image-2 接口的图片生成与编辑工具 | 近期热门 | 总 265 stars
item.author: CookSleep

item.title: CookSleep/gpt_image_playground
item.description: 基于 OpenAI gpt-image-2 接口的图片生成与编辑工具 | 近期热门 | 总 265 stars
item.author: CookSleep

item.title: heider-x/vela
item.description: AI-powered IDE for novel writing — local LLM + RAG, privacy-first, BYOK. For web fiction authors and creative writers. | 近期热门 | 总 99 stars
item.author: heider-x

item.title: Beever-AI/beever-atlas
item.description: Your First LLM-Wiki Conversation Knowledge Base | 近期热门 | 总 84 stars
item.author: Beever-AI

item.title: QuickCompare by Trismik - 在您的数据上比较LLM，测量并选出最佳。
item.author: QuickCompare by Trismik

item.title: Happenstance - 使用AI搜索您的网络
item.author: Happenstance
